text: As artificial intelligence becomes more common in our daily lives, we must think carefully about ethics. One major issue is bias. If an AI system learns from unfair data, it can make biased decisions, for example in hiring or loan applications. Ensuring fairness means checking AI for such problems and correcting them. Privacy is another important concern. Many AI systems collect personal data, so developers must protect this information from misuse. Transparency is also essential. People should understand how and why an AI system makes its choices. Ultimately, we need responsible AI development, where engineers and companies create technology that respects these ethical values.
